svg.title: CommonsenseQA geometry controls across evaluation ranks
svg.desc: Held-out explained variance, target-versus-control differences, and between-minus-within subspace distance with problem-bootstrap 95 percent confidence intervals.

g.text: Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B, block 0; means and problem-bootstrap 95% CIs
Exact-bin evaluation; n=256 problems per rank; candidate-level 192-fit/64-held-out 4-fold protocol.
